ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom classification of the species */,
  "phyla" TEXT /* Phylum classification of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class classification of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order classification of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family classification of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus classification of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species classification of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_areas" (
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study area */,
  "study_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the study area */,
  "center_lat" REAL /* Center latitude of the study area */,
  "center_lon" REAL /* Center longitude of the study area */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geographical boundary of the study area */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the study area */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* Vegetation of the study area */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain of the study area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being observed */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area where the observation was made */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals observed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "observer" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the environmental data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_values" (
  "factor_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor value */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental factor */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area where the value was measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the value was measured */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the value was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES environmental_factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytical model */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area where the result was obtained */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being modeled */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the model (e.g., predicted probability of presence) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user pair */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user working on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the data */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area being shared */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being shared */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the shared data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the data */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area being requested */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being requested */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was made */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "species_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first species involved in the interaction */,
  "species_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second species involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., predator-prey, symbiotic) */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area where the interaction was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_interactions_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_interactions_species_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("species_id_1") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_interactions_species_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("species_id_2") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_area_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study area */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., elevation, soil type) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_area_characteristics_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id")
)
